creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Kai, 18.12.08, 11:12h CET:

> Hi Stefan,
> 
> I doubt that that patch is needed, I got it from upstream (openbsd's  
> sources): its a fix that removes an old ipv6 option in setsockopt iirc.
> 
> Should I invest more time in it?

I'd say it only needs to be fixed if it's broken, so if nobody notices any
problems, there's no need for a patch. I'll close the PR, then - if any
issues arise, please open a new one!

Thanks and regards,
Stefan
